children.label: A
children.text: summarizes the compliance by such Federal agency with the alternative fuel purchasing requirements for Federal fleets under this Act and Executive Order No. 13031; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes a plan of compliance that contains specific dates for achieving compliance using reasonable means.

children.label: i
children.text: any information on any failure to meet statutory requirements or requirements under Executive Order No. 13031;

children.label: I
children.text: any plan of compliance that the agency head is required to submit under Executive Order No. 13031; or

children.label: II
children.text: if a plan of compliance referred to in subclause (I) does not contain specific dates by which the Federal agency is to achieve compliance, a revised plan of compliance that contains specific dates for achieving compliance; and

children.label: iii
children.text: any related information the agency head is required to submit to the Director of the Office of Management and Budget under Executive Order No. 13031.

children.heading: Penultimate report
children.label: B Penultimate report
children.text: The penultimate report submitted under paragraph (1) shall include an announcement that the report for the next year shall be the final report submitted under paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: placing such report on a publicly available website on the Internet; and

children.label: B
children.text: publishing the availability of the report, including such website address, in the Federal Register.
